dj_text: That was Scatman (Medieval | Bardcore Style). Easing into Easy Lover - Phil Collins [Bardcore | Medieval version]. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: Hear ye, hear ye! Gather 'round for a bewitched blast of bards and ballads from Dimensional DJ Dirk's Channel-Crossing C
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Easy Lover - Phil Collins [Bardcore | Medieval version]
